hooks.command: bash -c 'RESULT=/tmp/verify-pr-result.json; if [ ! -f "$RESULT" ]; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"verify-pr has not been run. Execute: task verify-pr PR_NUMBER=<number>\"}"; exit 0; fi; STATUS=$(cat "$RESULT" | sed -n '"'"'s/.*"status":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'"'"'); if [ "$STATUS" != "pass" ]; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"verify-pr failed. Fix issues and re-run before updating PR.\"}"; exit 0; fi; echo "{\"decision\":\"allow\"}"'

bash -c 'RESULT=/tmp/verify-pr-result.json; if [ ! -f "$RESULT" ]; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"verify-pr has not been run. Execute: task verify-pr PR_NUMBER=<number>\"}"; exit 0; fi; STATUS=$(cat "$RESULT" | sed -n '"'"'s/.*"status":"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p'"'"'); if [ "$STATUS" != "pass" ]; then echo "{\"decision\":\"block\",\"reason\":\"verify-pr failed. Fix issues and re-run before updating PR.\"}"; exit 0; fi; echo "{\"decision\":\"allow\"}"'
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"PR has been created. Execute the review process defined in docs/pr/README.md. Loop until all issues are resolved."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Push completed. If a PR exists, execute the review process defined in docs/pr/README.md. Loop until all issues are resolved."}}'
